description: Pre-built step execution inputs for testing W2 directly (without running W1 first). Each entry simulates what W3 would pass to W2.

steps.description: A simple extraction step with no dependencies

input.sourcePrompt: Write a research report on AI safety alignment techniques.

step.name: Extract Requirements
step.purpose: Identify all explicit and implicit requirements from the source prompt
step.task_instructions: Read the source prompt carefully. List every explicit requirement (stated directly) and every implicit requirement (implied by context). Output as structured sections.

steps.description: A research step that depends on the extraction step

input.sourcePrompt: Write a research report on AI safety alignment techniques.

step.name: Research RLHF
step.purpose: Research Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback approach
step.task_instructions: Research RLHF as an AI alignment technique. Cover: definition, how it works, key papers (Christiano et al. 2017, Ouyang et al. 2022), strengths, weaknesses, current applications. Cite real sources.

input.sourcePrompt: Write a research report on AI safety alignment techniques.

step.name: Assemble Final Report
step.purpose: Combine all step outputs into the final document
step.task_instructions: Do not regenerate analysis. Assemble, sequence, deduplicate, and format only. Combine all upstream step outputs into a coherent markdown document following the final_document_order.
